name: preflight-scout
description: PR-aware release QA that maps changes, runs focused checks and bounded browser missions, and reports evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Run focused PR checks and collect release evidence
interface.longDescription: Map pull-request changes to product risk, run safe browser missions when a target is available, and report failures, blockers, unknowns, and evidence before merge.
defaultPrompt: Use Preflight Scout to assess this repository's current change and summarize release readiness with evidence.
Use Preflight Scout to turn this pull request into a focused browser-verification mission.
